text:
Once upon a moonlit night, in a little cottage nestled against the whispering trees of the Enchanted Grove, a girl named Elara dreamed of stars. Every night after her restless puppy awake hours, Elara would sit under the ancient oak, tracing patterns in the moonlight.

One day, when she was ten years old, she took her star tracing pad and pen beneath the oak. The oak rustled, as if saying goodnight.

She drew an eight-pointed star, careful to place the middle point precisely. As she added a heart around it, something magical seemed to glide over her drawing. She looked away for a moment, and when she came back, her star was a dazzling seven-pointed star.

Excited, she dashed back to the oak. This time, as she added the heart, a glowing ember emerged from its heart. It flew up into the sky. Elara clutched it warmly.

Later that evening, with the full moon casting silver sparks
